summary: Re-verified the previously-CRITICAL Signup wizard Step 2 -> Step 3 auto-submit bug. Main agent's fix (adding distinct React keys `wizard-next` and `wizard-submit` to the conditionally-rendered Next/Submit buttons in SignUpWizard.tsx) is confirmed WORKING. All 3 wizard steps are now individually reachable, state retention across Back/Next fully works, dropzone file input works, and final Submit routes to Dashboard with the user-entered hotel name. Login and Check-in regressions also pass. No new issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: handleSubmit still schedules an 800ms setTimeout without storing/clearing it on unmount — small risk of setState-on-unmounted warning. Non-blocking.
Wizard steps do NOT enforce required-field validation before advancing (Next always allowed even with empty fields). Optional per-step validation would harden UX.

Regarding fix-approach: distinct `key` props resolves the DOM-node reuse; another equally-robust alternative would have been to wrap the two branches in different parent elements or always render both and toggle visibility.
test_credentials: Mocked. Prefilled email + any non-empty password (used Secret123!).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signup wizard bug fully fixed and verified. All flows (login, signup 3-step wizard with Back/Next state retention, file upload, final submit routing to Dashboard with correct hotel name, dashboard KPIs, check-in flip + toast, sign-out, mobile drawer) are passing on the current build. No open issues.
verified_passing: Wizard Step 1 -> Step 2 -> Step 3 no longer auto-submits (previous CRITICAL bug FIXED).
Wizard Step 3 -> Step 2 Back preserves hotelName='Ocean Crest Resort', propertyType='Hotel', starRating='5 Star', address (Coastal Ave text).
Wizard Step 2 -> Step 1 Back preserves firstName='Jordan', lastName='Reyes'.
Wizard forward path from Step 1 -> Step 2 -> Step 3 works reliably a second time after Back navigation.
signup-file-input accepts a file; uploaded-file-name renders the uploaded filename ('test_business_doc.pdf').
wizard-submit-button routes to Dashboard AND header-hotel-name shows 'Ocean Crest Resort' (from wizard data, not the default 'Grand Regent Hotel').
Regression: check-in-button-g1 -> checked-in-badge-g1 + checkin-toast still works.
Regression: login flow (enter-console-button with Secret123!) still reaches Dashboard showing 'Grand Regent Hotel'.
rca of the issue: Previous iteration_1 RCA (DOM node reuse causing browser default action to submit form after conditional Next -> Submit swap) is fully addressed by giving the two conditional buttons distinct React `key` props in SignUpWizard.tsx. Verified: clicking Next on Step 2 now cleanly transitions to Step 3 with the taxid input + file dropzone visible and does NOT trigger onSubmit/onAuthenticated. handleSubmit only fires when the actual wizard-submit-button (key='wizard-submit', type='submit') is clicked on Step 3.
